stories.name: Orbiting WebGL Swarm
stories.description: Render 2,500 particles in three-dimensional space using Three.js points mesh.

stories.name: Geometry Morphing
stories.description: Interpolate particle positions from chaotic orbits into a 3D Nautilus DNA spiral on lock.

stories.name: Color & Velocity Mutation
stories.description: Dynamically shift particle color themes and orbital velocities based on AI emotional output.

stories.name: Ambient Bass Drone
stories.description: Generate a continuous 55Hz detuned synth hum to represent the machine core energy.

stories.name: Harmonic Proximity Sweeps
stories.description: Increase lowpass filter frequency cutoffs as the user adjusts sliders closer to targets.

stories.name: Convergence Chime Chords
stories.description: Fire cascading arpeggiated tri-oscillator chime chords when vectors align at 73, 45, 19.

stories.name: Autoplay Security Gate
stories.description: Render terminal overlay requiring user interaction to instantiate browser AudioContext.

stories.name: Typewriter Lore Slideshow
stories.description: Present 4-step lore screen with typing animations and narrative spoken voice-overs.

stories.name: Oscilloscope Voice Bar
stories.description: Render reactive flickering bars at HUD bottom indicating voice playback activity.

stories.name: Gemini Proxy Endpoint
stories.description: Create secure serverless route api/chat.js to call Gemini 2.0 and sanitize JSON outputs.

stories.name: Microsoft Neural TTS
stories.description: Create serverless route api/tts.js using node-edge-tts to stream high-fidelity neural voices.

stories.name: Client TTS Fallback
stories.description: Configure browser speechSynthesis fallback if serverless audio endpoint times out.
